title: poa actruensis
intro: Poa annua, also known as annual bluegrass, is a common type of grass native to Europe and Asia, but now found in many other parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Poa annua include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Poa annua can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
